{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Delsin
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Delsin]] is a gas giant with sparkling [[diamond]] rings.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The moon of [[Delsin]] is visible from the [[Shadow Ark]] launch bay.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41">''The Knight'', chapter 41</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
